description: You are logged into 2N Access Commander at https://localhost:9443 as admin (password: 2n). During a data-quality review, you discovered that IT staff member Mei-Ling Zhang has been entered twice. Merge the duplicate account ('Meiling Zhang', ml.zhang@buildingtech.com) into the primary account ('Mei-Ling Zhang', m.zhang@buildingtech.com) by transferring the RFID card from the duplicate to the primary account and then deleting the duplicate. Create an audit report at ~/Documents/merge_report.txt containing the deleted duplicate's email or name, the primary's email or name, and the transferred card number.
